task:
Open /home/user/Documents/photo_base.png in GIMP and add /home/user/Documents/texture_overlay.png as a new layer above it.

Configure the top (texture) layer with blend mode = Multiply and opacity = 60%. Flatten the image and export the composite as PNG to /home/user/Documents/multiply_result.png. The output must be 512x512 pixels and reflect the Multiply blend (the center pixel must show the multiply effect rather than the raw base or raw overlay).

verification.description: Center pixel shows blend effect (not pure yellow/white from base) — R and G channels darkened by multiply
Center pixel blue channel still affected by multiply (not 255, not raw overlay either)
